creator: val@packett.cool
text:
(In reply to Takanori Watanabe from comment #1)

huh, which controllers *did* work with the wrong bit?

The USB dongles I have — all 0a12:0001, but two are recognized as "CSR8510" (and don't support random addresses), while another newer one (marked "v5.0", supports random addresses but doesn't like the set encryption command for some reason) is "USB1.1-A" — needed this fix..
